title: Sprint on CTRL
description: This mod allows you to sprint by pressing CTRL in old versions of Minecraft
body:
🏃 Sprint on CTRL Mod 🚀 Features: - 🔹 Hold Ctrl + W to sprint (no need to double-tap W). - 🔹 Lightweight and does not impact performance. - 🔹 Works in singleplayer and multiplayer!. How it improves gameplay:

This mod makes sprinting easier and more comfortable, similar to modern Minecraft versions. Just hold Ctrl and keep running effortlessly!

Installation: - 1️⃣ Requires Minecraft Forge or ModLoader. - 2️⃣ Place SprintKey.jar in your mods folder. - 3️⃣ Launch the game and enjoy!
